name: PrepareProcessContextData
businessLogic: Read isFeeApplicable flag from SlotsDTO using DDLCConstants.DOMAIN + '.isFeeApplicable' key and parse it as boolean.
Retrieve InternalDataModel from SlotsDTO using PMConstants.DOMAIN_INTERNAL_DATA_MODEL key.
Retrieve currentCommandPayLoad string from SlotsDTO using PMConstants.DOMAIN_CURRENT_COMMAND_PAYLOAD key.
Set DOMAIN_CURRENT_AGGREGATE on SlotsDTO using idm.getCurrentAggregate().
Set DOMAIN_CURRENT_COMMAND_PAYLOAD on SlotsDTO using the retrieved currentCommandPayLoad.
Set DOMAIN_NEXT_COMMAND_IS_ASYNC on SlotsDTO using idm.getNextCommandIsAsync().
Set ORIGINAL_OPERATION on SlotsDTO using slotsDTO.getOperation().
If isFeeApplicable is true and featureType is 'FundTransfer', set DOMAIN_CURRENT_STATE to 'CHECKING_ACCOUNT_TRANSFER_WITH_FEE_INITIATED'.
If isFeeApplicable is true and featureType is 'MultiCreditTransaction', set DOMAIN_CURRENT_STATE to 'MULTI_CREDIT_WITH_FEE_INITIATED'.
If isFeeApplicable is true and featureType is 'MultiDebitTransaction', set DOMAIN_CURRENT_STATE to 'MULTI_DEBIT_WITH_FEE_INITIATED'.
